Recommended HA Strategy: Use ZRS for in-region high availability where supported
Recommended DR Strategy: Use GRS or GZRS and prepare failover procedures
Recommended Architecture Pattern: ZRS for HA; GZRS for combined zonal and regional protection
Recommended Replication Approach: Synchronous in-region with asynchronous geo replication
Recommended Failover Method: Customer-managed planned or unplanned failover depending scenario
Why This Fits: Fits storage-centric workloads that can choose redundancy directly from the platform.
Key Caveats: GRS and GZRS are asynchronous; not all services support read access in the secondary.
Operational Prerequisites: Redundancy selection, endpoint handling, failover testing
